name: razor
description: YAGNI enforcement at the harness level, not the prompt level. Injects a compact first-rung-that-holds ladder (skip it / reuse it / stdlib / platform / installed dep / one line / minimum that works) into the main thread and — gated by agent type — into code-writing subagents only, so read-only Explore/Plan spawns never pay the injection tax. Backs the prompt with mechanical soft gates: a PreToolUse dependency guard that denies the first install of a new package with a reuse-first reason (the identical retry passes — one forced reconsideration, never a hard block), and a per-turn new-file meter that challenges file sprawl once, then self-clears. Boolean on/off (/razor off), no intensity dial. Pairs with hush: hush governs how the agent talks, razor governs what it builds. Tune via RAZOR_DISABLE, RAZOR_DEP_GUARD, RAZOR_FILE_BUDGET, RAZOR_AGENT_SKIP, RAZOR_AGENT_INJECT.
